---
title: "Schedule"
toc: true
---

> **Public version.** A generic week-by-week topic map. Specific dates
> live in the LMS for each section.

| Week | Topic                                  | Notes / Activities |
| ---- | -------------------------------------- | ------------------ |
| 1    | What is statistics? Variables and data | placeholder        |
| 2    | Describing distributions               | placeholder        |
| 3    | Bivariate descriptions                 | placeholder        |
| 4    | Designing studies                      | placeholder        |
| 5    | Probability foundations                | placeholder        |
| 6    | Sampling distributions                 | placeholder        |
| 7    | Confidence intervals                   | placeholder        |
| 8    | Hypothesis tests                       | placeholder        |
| 9    | Two-sample inference                   | placeholder        |
| 10   | Regression                             | placeholder        |
| 11   | Categorical data and chi-square        | placeholder        |
| 12   | A first look at Bayesian reasoning     | placeholder        |
| 13   | Reproducibility and rigor              | placeholder        |
| 14   | Review and synthesis                   | placeholder        |
